name: Veggies Rice
recipeIngredient: Scallions, enough to make 1/2 cup when chopped
Mushrooms, enough to make 1/2 cup when chopped
Bouillon cubes (amount based on 2 cups water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the broccoli into stems and florets, keeping them separate.
2. Peel the carrot and chop scallions to about 1/2 cup when chopped.
3. Finely mince the mushrooms and garlic.
4. In a large saucepan with about 1/4 inch of water, heat over high heat.
5. Add scallions, minced garlic, broccoli stems, and carrot to the pan. Cover and steam for 5 minutes.
6. Add mushrooms, brown rice, remaining 1 1/2 cups water, parsley, and bouillon cubes.
7. Stir once, then reduce heat to low. Keep covered until a vigorous boil occurs.
8. Continue cooking on low heat (do not remove the cover) until the water is mostly absorbed, about 35 minutes.
9. At this point, add the broccoli florets for an additional 5 minutes of steaming.
10. Before serving, stir everything together and serve.
